# GitHub Copilot - Workspace Rules

Read and follow [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) for the shared workspace rules.
This file is the Copilot-specific adapter referenced by the workspace docs.

## Environment Setup

```bash
source .agent/scripts/set_git_identity_env.sh --detect
# or
source .agent/scripts/set_git_identity_env.sh --agent copilot
```

## References

- [`../AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) - Shared workspace rules
- [`../.agent/AI_IDENTITY_STRATEGY.md`](../.agent/AI_IDENTITY_STRATEGY.md) - Identity setup
